title: With Thursday: Fabricated
description: A fabric & 1.20.1 port of With Thursday( a mod that adds KFC food items )
body:
A rewritten 1.20.1 port & fabric port of [With Thursday](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/with-thursday) alongside with it's original textures.

This mod adds: 
33 new food items
10 new drinks
With each having their own crafting recipes

this port replaces the vanilla water bottle in crafting recipes with an "empty cup" for better realism.


This mod is meant to be played with [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
